content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 9, 1), (2, 4, 9), (5, 7, 9), (0, 3, 11), (2, 5, 11), (4, 9, 17), (4, 8, 20), (0, 2, 22), (5, 6, 22), (3, 9, 23), (5, 8, 24), (3, 6, 26)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 9 exactly at time 23.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 23:

* Edge (5, 9, 1) has node 9 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 4, 9) has node 9 and time 9. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (5, 7, 9) has node 9 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 3, 11) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (2, 5, 11) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 9, 17) has node 9 and time 17. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 8, 20) has node 9 and time 20. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 2, 22) has node 9 and time 22. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (5, 6, 22) has node 9 and time 22. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 9, 23) has node 9 and time 23. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (5, 8, 24) has node 9 and time 24. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 6, 26) has node 9 and time 26. -> Add node 3.

The nodes matched are 5, 2, 4, 9, 0, 3, 8, and 6.

Answer: [5, 2, 4, 9, 0, 3, 8, 6]
